description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul style. The front features a sunburst finish with a cream pickguard, two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and a three-way toggle switch. The body is contoured and glossy, with metallic hardware including a bridge and tailpiece. The neck is set-in and features a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard with inlaid position markers. The back and sides are finished in a solid black, and the headstock is fitted with six tuning pegs arranged three per side. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood, metal, and plastic components, typical of high-quality electric guitars.
description: A sunburst-finished, single-cutaway electric guitar with a cream pickguard, dual humbuckers, and a glossy black back. Features metallic hardware and a classic headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, cream pickguard, dual humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and toggle switch.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim, solid body and the protruding control knobs and hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black finish on the back and neck, with no visible electronics or pickguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the guitar's thickness and the edge of the pickguard and hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning pegs, classic Les Paul shape, no visible logo
